Game.Name: Taxi 2- Le Jeu
Game.Plot: Taxi 2: Le Jeu (Taxi 2: The Game) is a racing game developed by Blue Sphere for the Sega Dreamcast based on the French film Taxi 2. It is notable for being the only Dreamcast game exclusive to France, and the only Sega game for that matter (aside from localised versions). The game was also released for the Sony PlayStation and PC.
